EMAIL 1 - Casual Introduction:
Subject: Hello from a new user!

Hi RestWell Team,

I just downloaded RestWell today and finished setting up my profile. The interface looks really user-friendly and I'm excited to start using it!

I've been struggling with sleep quality lately and decided it was time to try a structured approach with an app. RestWell had great reviews, so I'm optimistic this will help.

Looking forward to learning more about healthy sleep habits and finding what works for me.

Thanks,
Karen

EMAIL 2 - Friendly Check-in:
Subject: Getting started with RestWell

Hey there,

I've been exploring the app features over the past couple days and I'm impressed with how comprehensive it is. The sleep tracking looks really detailed and I like the educational content about sleep hygiene.

I'm planning to start using the recommendation features soon once I get a better baseline of my sleep patterns tracked.

Just wanted to say hi and that I'm happy to be part of the RestWell community!

Cheers,
Karen
